title: Nostalgic Garlicy Tunisian Stir-fry
description: A dense and garlicky dish featuring turmeric that combines spices to create a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add chopped garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in ground beef and cook until it's fully cooked through, breaking up any lumps with a wooden spoon.
Sprinkle turmeric powder over the meat mixture and mix well to coat all ingredients evenly.
Pour in tomato paste and stir continuously for about 2 minutes until it starts to thicken slightly.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the dish for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt if needed. The dish should be quite spicy but not overwhelmingly so; adjust to your preference.
